data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Gerrit-side classification + canary complete (operational; deployed-VM signing evidence recorded on ticket). Classification: opcert-service non-writing (REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off), review-bot code_review artifacts gate-exempt, review-bot relates_to LINK on work tickets = in-scope + signed via append_event. Canary: deployed review-bot alive (LLM-Review +1 on changes 741/746, merged) + produces signed relates_to LINK events on non-exempt tickets (594c). The completion verifier cannot exercise the deployed VM from the code tree, so closing on recorded evidence.". Session: e533bbc2-be02-4c77-890b-73fde9abf109.
